text: 35g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

on the plus side: usually better than just grabbing candy. the misc rules should reward a functional upgrade when it is real. can still earn points as a better swap. the category should reward harm reduction when it is real. context tells the real story. that is the whole point of misc.

now the downsides: still easy to overrate as a health food. a protein bar is often a useful compromise, not a clean win. easy to overrate or misuse. this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist. that practical comparison matters.
C tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
